title: Cymatic Caustic Caster
description: Generative simulation of a water surface and the caustics it casts — rain, wind, and cymatic (sound-driven) ripples, with mouse interaction and randomized settings on each load. Load 3D geometry to catch the caustics.

title: Moiré Pattern Generator
description: Interactive moiré interference tool rendered entirely in a fragment shader: ten grating types plus custom GLSL, up to 8 layers with per-layer combine ops, SDF shape masks, color modes, and anti-aliasing controls.

title: Holographic Diffraction Gratings
description: Design, visualize, and export holographic diffraction grating patterns: linear, radial, Fresnel zone-plate, spiral, crossed, starburst, and carbon-fiber weave gratings, with a live diffracted-spectrum preview from the grating equation and PNG/SVG export.
